prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-DINOTRUCKCARCARRIER-BLU Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 3 in 1 Ultimate T Rex Diecast Car Transporter Truck with Slide and Launch Action, Blue (Ages 3 and Up) Description: Roaring fun meets high speed action with Kidplokio’s Ultimate T Rex Diecast Cars Transport Truck! This dinosaur toys diecast car transport truck features a fierce dinosaur design, an exciting car launch action, 15 inch long car slide and four brightly colored diecast cars to play with. This fierce T Rex transport truck is designed for dino lovers and budding racers alike, making it the ultimate transport truck and display case for diecast cars!

LAUNCH ACTION: This epic T Rex diecast car transport truck features an exciting launch action, that sends diecast cars flying into adventure

CAR SLIDE: Open the top of the transporter truck to create a 15 inch long slide, simply push the legs down and lock into place for another exciting way for kids and toddlers to play

DINO DISPLAY CASE: When not in use, the T Rex transport truck keeps diecast cars neatly tucked away and organized until playtime can begin again

This dinosaur truck playset also encourages engaging playtime sessions where kids imaginations can roar! Toddlers and little ones will love creating fun pretend play scenarios, while also encouraging eye hand coordination and dexterity, as well as hands on and screen free playtime with friends and family. And, with a built in carry handle and snap close side doors, kids can easily tote this T Rex truck transporter to go for play dates, travel and more.

Perfect for both playtime and display, this truck is a must have for every little dinosaur lover. Buckle up for thrilling adventures, where the roar of excitement never ends! Search Terms: Toddler pretend play tactile sensory dinosaur toys diecast car display case t rex dinosaur toy stocking stuffers toys for three year old boys tactile sensory fine motor skills birthday presents pretend play screen free activities for toddlers kids to Features: - T REX TRUCK TRANSPORTER: 3 in 1 portable dinosaur toys transforms from diecast car truck transporter to car launch and slide playset! The playset comes with four diecast cars and with no assembly required, this dinosaur toys transport truck is ready to go right out of the box - AWESOME CAR LAUNCH ACTION: This epic T Rex diecast car transport truck features a fierce dinosaur design and an exciting launch action, that sends diecast cars flying into adventure! - SUPER COOL CAR SLIDE: What’s more, the top of the dinosaur truck transporter lifts open to create a 15 inch long slide; Simply push the legs down and lock into place for another exciting way for kids and toddlers to play! - TACTILE TOYS FOR BOYS: Let their imaginations roar with this hands on dinosaur toys diecast cars playset! Kids will love creating lots of fun pretend play scenarios, while it also encourages eye hand coordination and dexterity, as well as hands on and screen free playtime with friends and family - DURABLE AND SAFE: Built to withstand even the most thrilling prehistoric adventures, this dinosaur themed truck transporters are safe and durable enough for all kinds of active playtime and is easy to wipe down; designed with little hands in mind, this playset is suitable for children ages three and up === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
